title: Assessment of chronic bronchitis and risk factors in young adults: results from BAMSE.
ehr_evidence: None; data were obtained from the Swedish BAMSE population-based birth cohort using questionnaire data and clinical measures.
summary: The study assesses the prevalence and early-life risk factors (e.g., air pollution, breastfeeding) for chronic bronchitis in young adults using the Swedish BAMSE birth cohort.
key_findings: Air pollution (black carbon at ages 1-4y) associated with CB (aOR 1.71)
Exclusive breastfeeding for >=4 months associated with lower CB risk (aOR 0.66)
limitations: Not specified in the provided text
